Rows.IDAComment: mode/sub-op byte (0=drop pick-up, 1=quest record, 2=cash item expire, 3=inc EXP, 4=inc SP/POP, 5=inc meso, 6=inc GP, 7=give buff, 8=general item expire, 9=system message, 0xA=quest record ex, 0xB=item protect expire, 0xC=item expire replace, 0xD=skill expire; v83 has 14 modes, v95 added mode 14=skill expire as 0xE)

Rows.Note: atlas: extra — client never reads this field
